---
title: "Drift Engine Architecture"
subtitle: "How UIAO detects, quantifies, and enforces against configuration drift"
---

::: {.callout-note}
## Architecture document in preparation
Full architecture documentation is being drafted. For current coverage, see the [Drift Engine Overview](../executive-briefs/drift-engine-overview.qmd). The drift detection specification is defined in `src/uiao/governance/DRIFT-*` modules.
:::
